hooks.prompt: CDN CHECK: Scan new_string for URLs containing '@latest'. If found, output 'BLOCKED: @latest CDN — pin to specific version'. Otherwise output nothing. Tool input: $ARGUMENTS

PRE-PUSH: Check if pushing to the project's default branch (main, master, develop, or trunk). If so, output 'WARN: Direct push to default branch — use a feature branch'. Otherwise output nothing. Tool input: $ARGUMENTS

hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Commit created. Consider running /wrap if this is end of session."}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"CONTEXT PRESERVATION: Before compacting, note the current work state. Check: (1) Which file is being edited, (2) Any pending changes not yet committed, (3) Which agents were recommended but not yet run. Carry these forward through compaction."}}'

STATUS=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -5) && if [ -n "$STATUS" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Uncommitted changes detected. Consider running /wrap before closing.\"}"; else echo '{}'; fi
